title: Control Craft
description: Break Newton's rule, Now your machines define gravity!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57b1fbd9dc4fa43fc82685f266e3e9fb0ea53bfd_0.webp)

## **What is Control Craft**

### *Precision Engineering for Valkyrien-Skies*

Control Craft is a comprehensive expansion for Valkyrien-Skies, designed to transform your airships and mechanical creations with granular physics control and high-performance automation. By integrating modular controllers, adaptive power systems, and hybrid circuitry, Control Craft empowers engineers to build compact, responsive, and intricately orchestrated machines.
## **Contents:**
- **Multi-Functional Physics Controllers**
   - Dynamic/Kinematic Motors & Pistons: Fine-tune rotational/linear motion.
- **Adjustable Power Sources**
   - Propellers & Vector Thrusters: Direct thrust with customizable torque, angle, and thrust directions.
   - Flap Bearings/Compact Flap: Responsive flap controls
- **Utilities**
   - Gravitational Anchor: Customize drag, gravity
   - Spatial Anchor: Align physics structures with ease
   - Camera: Link from thousands of blocks away, get vision from your ships
- **Cimulink Circuitry**
   - Design circuits using familiar components—logic gates, comparators, analog adders, sensors, and even lua scripts! Then compress entire networks into reusable, block-sized modules, replacing big and janky redstone circuits.

_**Suggest playing with pathouli to view in-game guide!**_

### **Notice:**
For feedback and issue reporting, please visit our **QQ Channel** or **Discord Server**. Make sure to include a description of the problem, along with supporting materials such as videos, crash reports, and detailed reproduction steps. If an issue could be identified through description alone, it would have been resolved already.
**_Feedback without supporting evidence means NOTHING_**.
